steps.t: Ultan Foebane is at the Combe-gate on the east side of the town of Bree. You have been told to speak with Ultan Foebane, a mighty champion travelling …
Ultan Foebane is at the Combe-gate on the east side of the town of Bree. You have defeated the three opponents that Ultan Foebane challenged you to be…
